title: Store artifact
description: A single concept-cafe/girls-bar store's current state plus append-only change history -- the validation contract for a row assembled from tools/store_collector's stores/store_enrichment tables (SQLite is the storage; this schema validates the shape before a write, it is not itself a file format). Store-level facts only -- individual cast (キャスト) names, photos, or any other cast-identifying data MUST NOT appear anywhere in this document (out of Phase 1/2 scope per Business Strategy.md section 20/21; no consent infrastructure exists yet). Census-pivot (2026-07-21): most fields are conditionally required based on `completeness_tier`, not universally required -- a bare census row (name + existence only) is a valid document.

store_id.description: Stable slug/hash derived from normalize(store_name + area). Used as the dedupe key.

store_type.description: Business Strategy.md section 20 in-scope categories, or `unknown` at census time before this can be confirmed. Any category outside concept_cafe/girls_bar requires a scope-expansion ADR before use.

completeness_tier.description: known: name+existence only (census). has_official_source: an official site/SNS URL has been identified. enriched: hours/pricing/address populated from that source. verified: verification_method+reliability_score+last_verified_at confirmed and within its Freshness SLO. Only `verified` counts toward the Verified Fresh Store Coverage KPI numerator -- never report a bare count across tiers as if it were coverage.

area.description: Ward/district/station label used for area-coverage KPIs across the eventual multi-area rollout, e.g. 上野, 歌舞伎町, 秋葉原.

coordinate_source.description: How lat/lng was obtained, e.g. official-site-map-embed, geocoded-from-address, nearby-poi-estimate.

open.description: 24h+ clock allowed (e.g. 25:00 for past-midnight close) is expressed by continuing past 23:59 in `close`, not here.

price_unavailable_reason.description: Required when price_items is present but empty -- explain why pricing could not be captured yet.

phone.description: Store's own published contact number, from an official source only.

cast_headcount.description: Aggregate count only. No individual cast names, photos, or other identifying fields are permitted anywhere in this document.

source_url.description: At completeness_tier=known this may be a non-URL provenance note (e.g. "web-search: varied queries, 2026-07-21") rather than a fetchable URL -- a census entry has no single fetched page. At has_official_source and above, entries must be real fetchable source URLs.

first_seen_at.description: When this store was first noticed to exist (census time). Distinct from last_verified_at, which tracks when any detail was last confirmed.

last_verified_at.description: When any field was last independently confirmed against an official source. Absent for known-tier rows.

change_log.description: Append-only. Satisfies Business Strategy.md section 8's requirement to retain 営業時間履歴/システム変更履歴/イベント履歴/SNS変更履歴/URL変更履歴/閉店・移転履歴. Never rewrite or delete an existing entry.
